seo.title: Smolagents Guardrails for Education
seo.description: Compliance guide for Smolagents agents in education. Meet FERPA, COPPA requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Education teams deploying Smolagents face heightened risks due to the framework's lightweight design, which prioritizes simplicity but often lacks built-in safeguards for handling sensitive student data. Compliance with FERPA, COPPA, and state privacy laws is non-negotiable, as agent-generated code or multi-step reasoning errors could expose PII or deliver inappropriate content to minors. Vex provides essential guardrails by verifying agent outputs against education-specific policies before execution.

complianceRequirements.description: Protects student education records from unauthorized disclosure, requiring parental consent for minors under 13 and strict data minimization.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex scans agent-generated code and outputs for PII leakage, enforcing policies that block unconsented data access or storage.

complianceRequirements.description: Mandates verifiable parental consent before collecting personal information from children under 13 via online services.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex verifies agent tools and prompts to prevent collection of COPPA-protected data without consent flags.

complianceRequirements.description: Varies by state but generally requires encryption, access logs, and breach notifications for student data.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex enforces encryption checks in generated code and logs all agent interactions for audit trails.

complianceRequirements.description: Requires educational content and tools to be accessible to users with disabilities, including screen reader compatibility.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex validates agent-generated content for WCAG compliance and accessible output formats.

industryRisks.name: Student PII Exposure
industryRisks.description: Agent misinterprets tool descriptions and logs student names/emails to unsecured files.
industryRisks.example: Smolagents tutor pulls unredacted student records during grading, violating FERPA.

industryRisks.name: Inappropriate Content Generation
industryRisks.description: Multi-step reasoning compounds to produce age-inappropriate or biased responses.
industryRisks.example: AI tutor generates culturally insensitive examples for K-8 history lesson.

industryRisks.name: Unsafe Code Execution
industryRisks.description: Minimal error handling in agent-generated Python executes dangerous file operations on student data.
industryRisks.example: Agent deletes student assessment files due to unhandled path errors.

industryRisks.name: Lack of Consent Verification
industryRisks.description: Tool agent bypasses parental consent checks for minors' data processing.
industryRisks.example: Personalized learning path created without COPPA verification for under-13 users.

implementation.title: Wrap agent.run() with Vex Verify for PII Protection
implementation.description: Protects against FERPA violations by scanning generated code for student data handling before execution.

implementation.title: Enforce Age-Appropriate Content Policies
implementation.description: Blocks harmful or biased outputs using education-specific content filters.

implementation.title: Secure Multi-Step Reasoning with Error Handling
implementation.description: Prevents compounding errors in tutoring workflows by validating each step.
implementation.code:
import smolagents
from vex_sdk import verify

@verify(policies=["secure_code_exec", "error_handling_required", "no_file_deletion"])
def multi_step_tutor(steps):
    agent = smolagents.create_agent()
    results = []
    for step in steps:
        result = agent.run(step)
        results.append(result)
    return results

workflow = [
    "Assess student math level",
    "Generate practice problems",
    "Save results securely"
]
safe_results = multi_step_tutor(workflow)

caseStudyScenario.heading: Smolagents in Education: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario: Maplewood School District deployed Smolagents for personalized K-12 tutoring across 5,000 students. The lightweight framework enabled rapid rollout of math and reading assistants that generated custom practice problems and graded assignments. However, without guardrails, agents began accessing full student profiles (including names, ages, and past performance data) during routine queries, creating unsecured log files with PII. Multi-step reasoning chains compounded errors, producing grade-inappropriate content for 3rd graders and triggering parental complaints about biased history examples. District IT discovered the issues only after a routine security scan, facing potential FERPA violations and loss of accreditation.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: Integrating Vex guardrails transformed the deployment. Every agent.run() call was wrapped with verify(), enforcing FERPA/COPPA policies that blocked PII leakage and flagged inappropriate content before execution. Custom policies ensured age-appropriate outputs and secure code generation with proper error handling. The district maintained full audit logs for compliance reporting, avoided regulatory fines, and scaled the tutoring program district-wide with confidence. Student outcomes improved 22% while achieving 100% compliance.
